title: Baby Bee Panorama
description: I may bee crazy to say this but bees are kinda... beeing useful for once as of the recent Copper Update? Well, beecome an owner of your own bee filled panorama and bee as cool as they are now!
body:
# Time To Bee Beesieged By Bees
I may **bee** crazy to say this but **bees** are kinda... **beeing** useful for once as of the recent Copper Update?

Well, **beecome** an owner of your own **bee** filled panorama and **bee** as cool as they are now!

![Baby Bee Panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f357247a680b161a5188bac3d58aea9002f90728.png)

# Features
- Single rendered panorama of a baby bees scene for your main menu

# Not your cup of tea?
Feel free to check out [other panoramas](https://modrinth.com/user/Lumora) that I made for you!
